name: Graham Shuttleworth
background: Graham Shuttleworth was appointed Senior Executive Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer of Barrick in January 2019. He previously served as the CFO of Randgold Resources from 2007 until the merger. He is a Chartered Accountant.

commpanies.name: Barrick Gold Corporation
commpanies.title_or_role: Senior Executive Vice-President, Chief Financial Officer
